description: Elon the Mars Emperor (EMPEROR) is the FIRST Mars-themed memecoin on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time — dedicated to celebrating humanity’s unstoppable ambition to conquer new worlds. It embodies exceptional vision, innovation, and leadership beyond Earth, merging the spirit of space exploration with the limitless power of decentralized finance. Long live the Mars Emperor in Atlantis Kingdom.
name: Elon the Mars Emperor
